use_cases: Display images with a pixelated grid effect for artistic presentations on portfolios or galleries
Create engaging piece-by-piece fade-in animations for hero sections and landing pages
Add grayscale-to-color reveal transitions for emphasizing featured content
Use in media applications to display photos with a modern, stylized aesthetic
Enhance e-commerce product displays with animated pixel-grid effects
ai_summary: A media component that transforms images into a pixelated grid display with customizable animation effects. The PixelImage component breaks images into a configurable grid (e.g., 6x4, 8x8) and reveals each piece with fade animations, supporting grayscale-to-color transitions and timing controls. Ideal for creating engaging visual reveals on landing pages, portfolios, and product displays with a modern, stylized pixel-art aesthetic.
